atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive to inject base, components, utilities, or variants styles.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive to apply utility classes inline in your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive to define the order of CSS layers.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive to create media queries that reference your breakpoints by name.
